title: Centre for Cybersecurity - Home
text: Centre for CybersecurityCentre for CybersecurityPrioritising cybersecurity and fostering global public-private action to tackle systemic challenges.Enabling a secure digital and technological progressOur objective is to support every individual and organization to securely benefit from ongoing digital and technological progress.We strive to provide an independent and impartial platform to reinforce the importance of cybersecurity as a strategic priority and drive global public-private action to address systemic cybersecurity challenges.163Business partners52Public-sector partners3Ongoing initiativesOur initiativesOur initiatives bring together public and private partners to tackle global cybersecurity risks and strengthen digital resilience.AI & CybersecurityBringing together a global multi-stakeholder community to develop actionable guidance to help leaders adopt AI technologies in a secure manner.Partnership against CybercrimeAmplifying public-private cooperation to combat cybercrime and kick-start concrete actions.Cyber ResilienceDigitalization is the driver for industry growth, innovation and transformation. Enabling cyber resilience is key across industry ecosystems.Our impactWe work with partners worldwide to reduce systemic vulnerabilities and make cybersecurity a shared priority.Businesses are building a global response to cybersecurity risksTogether with over 150 global leaders, the Forum is enabling organizations to share and develop research, insights and responses to future cybersecurity risks.Strengthening cybersecurity in the oil and gas industryA community of over 40 private and public organizations work together to drive forward collective action in cyber resilience.Join us in ensuring the future of cybersecurityWe believe that to reinforce cybersecurity as a strategic imperative is only possible through public-private action. Be part of that change and join our community.World Economic Forum CentresThe world is confronted with a range of unprecedented challenges, and it's crucial for businesses, government, and civil society to work together to find common solutions and take decisive action. Through its Centres, the Forum integrates public-private efforts to achieve greater impact.Centre for CybersecurityPowered by© 2026 All rights reservedPrivacy Policy & Terms of Service
